fields.description: Your Twilio WhatsApp-enabled sender number in E.164 format (e.g. +14155238886)

fields.description: Prepended to mobile numbers that don't start with + (e.g. +91 for India)

fields.label: Media URL

fields.description: The Twilio Content Template SID (starts with HX...). Leave blank to send body as a regular message.
fields.label: Twilio Content SID

fields.description: Comma-separated variable names for reference (e.g. customer_name, amount, date)
fields.label: Variables
